description: Donor-relevant disclosure: identity, contact, security, and legal pointers published by a steward DID. Can be discovered from a DID directly, or from a domain by resolving its DID via DNS _atproto.

main.description: Canonical trust and legal disclosure published by a steward DID. Optionally restricted to specific domains via restrictToDomains.

restrictToDomains.description: Optional allowlist of domain/hostnames for which this disclosure should be considered applicable (e.g. example.com, pds.example.com). When omitted or empty, the disclosure is open.

effectiveDate.description: When this disclosure was last meaningfully updated (policy, legal, or identity refresh).

supersedes.description: Optional AT-URI of a prior fund.at.disclosure record this entry replaces.

meta.description: Public name, description, and landing page for the namespace or product.

displayName.description: Short public name of the project or namespace product.

contact.description: Contact channels for support and press.

url.description: Contact form or support page URL.

press.description: Optional press or media contact, if distinct from general.

security.description: Security policy and responsible disclosure contact.

policyUri.description: URL of the security or vulnerability disclosure policy.

contactUri.description: Security reporting form or page URL.

legal.description: Jurisdiction, entity name, and policy URLs for donors and users.

jurisdiction.description: Human-readable jurisdiction (e.g. region or governing law).

legalEntityName.description: Registered legal name of the entity receiving or governing donations, if applicable.

termsOfServiceUri.description: Terms governing use of the product or service.

privacyPolicyUri.description: Privacy policy covering user and donor data.

donorTermsUri.description: Terms specific to making a donation, if separate from general ToS.

taxDisclosureUri.description: Page describing tax treatment of donations (e.g. charity registration), varies by region.

softwareLicenseUri.description: License for software or lexicon artifacts, if distinct from donation terms.
